channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Labour Party Leadership Challenges Are Complex and Time-Consuming
item.description: The Labour Party’s internal rules make removing a leader significantly more complicated than the processes seen in the Conservative Party. While Conservative leadership challenges are often swift, inv...

item.title: Mahenge Graphite Project Nears Completion of Early Works in Preparation for Investment Decision
item.description: Black Rock Mining Limited is making solid progress with the Mahenge Graphite Project in Ulanga, Tanzania. The early works programme is almost done, with the final earthworks and resettlement activitie...

item.title: Drew Baglino, ex-Tesla executive, starts Sadi Thermal Machines to develop advanced heat pumps
item.description: Drew Baglino, a former senior executive at Tesla and the current CEO of Heron Power, has founded a new startup called Sadi Thermal Machines, focusing on heat pump technology. Established in June 2025,...

item.title: U2 shoot video for new single ‘Street Of Dreams’ on a Mexico City bus
item.description: U2 have shared footage of the band filming their upcoming single 'Street Of Dreams' atop a bus in Mexico City, signalling it as the lead single from their 15th studio album due later in 2026. Fans gat...

item.title: House Democrat Accuses DOJ of Approving Payments to FBI Agents with Misconduct Records
item.description: Rep. Jamie Raskin, the top Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee, published a letter accusing the Trump-era Department of Justice of ordering payments to FBI agents with histories of misconduct, i...

item.title: Government issues warning on illegal land occupation across Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzanian government has issued a stern warning against illegal occupation of land across the country. Authorities emphasize that encroachment on public and private land without proper permits or ...

item.title: Tanzania and Hungary Sign USD 55M Loan for Biharamulo Water Project to Expand Clean Water Access
item.description: Tanzania na Hungary wamefanikiwa kusaini makubaliano ya mkopo wa USD 55.1 milioni kwa ajili ya Mradi wa Maji Biharamulo uliopo Mkoa wa Kagera. Makubaliano haya yamesainiwa Dodoma na Katibu Mkuu wa Wiz...

item.title: Tanzania sees big rise in small fuel-efficient car imports in early 2026
item.description: For the first quarter of 2026, Tanzania experienced a significant rise in spending on imported household vehicles, totalling Sh352.84 billion in March, up from Sh229.3 billion same time last year. The...

item.title: Karachi court approves 3-day police custody of woman accused of drug trafficking
item.description: In Karachi, a local court has approved a three-day physical remand of Anmol alias Pinky, a high-profile female suspect involved in drug trafficking, as per Karachi South Police. Earlier, a request for...

item.title: 1962 Alfa Romeo Giulietta Sprint Speciale: Icon of Italian Automotive Design
item.description: The 1962 Alfa Romeo Giulietta Sprint Speciale stands as an extraordinary example of Italian automotive design and innovation from the early 1960s. Designed by Franco Scaglione for Bertone, the car’s s...

item.title: Kano Central APC Senate Race Faces Contest as Zaura Rejects Consensus
item.description: The Kano Central APC senatorial race don turn gbege as Abdulsalam Abdulkarim Zaura, wey dem sabi as AA Zaura, don reject the consensus wey put former governor Ibrahim Shekarau forward. Last week, six ...

item.title: Princess of Wales Embarks on First Overseas Visit Since Cancer Recovery to Promote Early Childhood Education
item.description: The Princess of Wales, Catherine, will make her first official international trip since her cancer recovery with a visit to Reggio Emilia, Italy. This marks a personal milestone for the princess, who ...

item.title: House of Representatives is not under martial law; video misrepresents the situation
item.description: A recent video claiming that the Philippine House of Representatives is under martial law is false. The video, posted by the YouTube channel 'JAY GUEVARRA TV,' suggested that the Marcos administration...

item.title: Malacañang assures Bato dela Rosa of lawful protection under Marcos administration
item.description: Malacañang has assured Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa that the administration of President Ferdinand “Bongbong” Marcos Jr. remains fair and committed to upholding the law, regardless of a person's po...

item.title: Middle East tensions and Hormuz tolls threaten Nigeria's import supply and inflation
item.description: Nigeria dey face serious wahala as tension for Middle East and toll wey Iran don start for Strait of Hormuz dey push up cost of imports sharply. The Persian Gulf Strait Authority wey Iran manage don b...

item.title: Strathcona County Maintains Combined Fire and Paramedic Services Despite Reduced Provincial Funding
item.description: Strathcona County council has decided to continue operating its integrated fire and paramedic services despite reductions in provincial funding for municipal ambulance contracts. The decision, passed ...

item.title: Bangladesh Faces Widespread Contraceptive Shortages Due to Administrative Failures
item.description: Bangladesh, once lauded for its successful family planning system, is now grappling with severe shortages of contraceptives, raising concerns over unplanned pregnancies in its densely populated areas....

item.title: Trump criticises media amid ongoing Iran-US conflict and UK deploys forces to Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the United States and Iran has intensified diplomatic and military tensions in the Middle East. Former US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised the American media...

item.title: Sam Altman Testifies in Musk Lawsuit Over OpenAI's Corporate Decisions
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman testified in court defending himself against a lawsuit from former co-founder Elon Musk, who is challenging OpenAI's corporate structure. Musk claimed that the creation of a for-...

item.title: House Committee Approves Kalinga Program to Support Filipinos During Oil Price Surges
item.description: The House Ad Hoc Committee on Legislative Energy Action and Development (LEAD) has approved the Kalinga bill, a measure aimed at helping Filipinos cope with rising oil prices caused by the ongoing Mid...
